use_cases: Decorative hero section animations for landing pages
Visual loading states and loading indicators
Eye-catching circle animations for marketing sites
Theme-aware decorative elements that adapt to light/dark mode
ai_summary: A reusable React component providing a collection of canvas-based circle animations with hover interactions and theme-aware foreground color support. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and dynamic CSS variables for color theming, featuring corner icons that appear on hover with smooth opacity transitions.
